headline: Newsmax: Why Strong Growth Is Not Enough
summary: Newsmax stock is a "Hold" as the cable news market continues to shrink and streaming gains remain slow. Click here to read my latest analysis of NMAX.

headline: How Investors May Respond To Fox (FOXA) Options Pricing In The Run-Up To Q3 2026 Earnings
summary: In recent days, options traders have focused on Fox Corporation, with the June 18, 2026 $40 call showing unusually high implied volatility as the market looks ahead to the company’s now-upcoming third-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings release on May 11, 2026. This combination of elevated options pricing and expectations for a modest year-over-year earnings decline, despite a history of topping estimates, highlights a gap between cautious analyst views and traders’ positioning for significant...
